scenarios.id: ReturnSkipLimit2 - Limit-[1] Limit to two hits
scenarios.query:
UNWIND [1, 1, 1, 1, 1] AS i
RETURN i
LIMIT 2
scenarios.skip_reason: parser: UNWIND keyword not yet in grammar

scenarios.id: ReturnSkipLimit2 - Limit-[2] Limit to two hits with explicit order
scenarios.description: [2] Limit to two hits with explicit order
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
RETURN n
ORDER BY n.name ASC
LIMIT 2

scenarios.id: ReturnSkipLimit2 - Limit-[3] LIMIT 0 should return an empty result
scenarios.description: [3] LIMIT 0 should return an empty result

scenarios.id: ReturnSkipLimit2 - Limit-[4] Handle ORDER BY with LIMIT 1
scenarios.query:
MATCH (p:Person)
RETURN p.name AS name
ORDER BY p.name
LIMIT 1

scenarios.id: ReturnSkipLimit2 - Limit-[5] ORDER BY with LIMIT 0 should not generate errors
scenarios.description: [5] ORDER BY with LIMIT 0 should not generate errors
scenarios.query:
MATCH (p:Person)
RETURN p.name AS name
ORDER BY p.name
LIMIT 0

scenarios.id: ReturnSkipLimit2 - Limit-[6] LIMIT with an expression that does not depend on variables
scenarios.description: [6] LIMIT with an expression that does not depend on variables
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
WITH n LIMIT toInteger(ceil(1.7))
RETURN count(*) AS count

scenarios.id: ReturnSkipLimit2 - Limit-[7] Limit to more rows than actual results 1
scenarios.description: [7] Limit to more rows than actual results 1
scenarios.query:
MATCH (foo)
RETURN foo.num AS x
  ORDER BY x DESC
  LIMIT 4

scenarios.id: ReturnSkipLimit2 - Limit-[8] Limit to more rows than actual results 2
scenarios.description: [8] Limit to more rows than actual results 2
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a:A)-->(n)-->(m)
RETURN n.num, count(*)
  ORDER BY n.num
  LIMIT 1000

scenarios.id: ReturnSkipLimit2 - Limit-[9] Fail when using non-constants in LIMIT
scenarios.description: [9] Fail when using non-constants in LIMIT

scenarios.id: ReturnSkipLimit2 - Limit-[10] Negative parameter for LIMIT should fail
scenarios.description: [10] Negative parameter for LIMIT should fail
scenarios.query:
MATCH (p:Person)
RETURN p.name AS name
LIMIT $_limit

scenarios.id: ReturnSkipLimit2 - Limit-[11] Negative parameter for LIMIT with ORDER BY should fail
scenarios.description: [11] Negative parameter for LIMIT with ORDER BY should fail
scenarios.query:
MATCH (p:Person)
RETURN p.name AS name
ORDER BY name LIMIT $_limit

scenarios.id: ReturnSkipLimit2 - Limit-[12] Fail when using negative value in LIMIT 1
scenarios.description: [12] Fail when using negative value in LIMIT 1

scenarios.id: ReturnSkipLimit2 - Limit-[13] Fail when using negative value in LIMIT 2
scenarios.description: [13] Fail when using negative value in LIMIT 2
scenarios.query:
MATCH (p:Person)
RETURN p.name AS name
LIMIT -1

scenarios.id: ReturnSkipLimit2 - Limit-[14] Floating point parameter for LIMIT should fail
scenarios.description: [14] Floating point parameter for LIMIT should fail
scenarios.query:
MATCH (p:Person)
RETURN p.name AS name
LIMIT $_limit

scenarios.description: [15] Floating point parameter for LIMIT with ORDER BY should fail
scenarios.query:
MATCH (p:Person)
RETURN p.name AS name

scenarios.id: ReturnSkipLimit2 - Limit-[17] Fail when using floating point in LIMIT 2
scenarios.description: [17] Fail when using floating point in LIMIT 2
scenarios.query:
MATCH (p:Person)
RETURN p.name AS name
LIMIT 1.5
